expectedOutcome.summary: two SubClassOf axioms lift to two Horn implications, transitive subsumption derivable via SLD

fixtures.intendedToCatch: lifter loses or duplicates SubClassOf chain semantics; emits reverse-direction implications; or silently collapses the chain to a single axiom

expectedOutcome.summary: EquivalentClasses lifts to two universals (mutual implication); DisjointWith lifts to a conjunction implying ⊥

fixtures.intendedToCatch: EquivalentClasses lifted as a single biconditional that decomposes incorrectly; DisjointWith lifted as a single negated atom rather than as the impossibility of co-membership

expectedOutcome.summary: someValuesFrom→existential conjunction; allValuesFrom→universal-implication; hasValue→fact via named individual

fixtures.intendedToCatch: someValuesFrom lifted without an existential witness; allValuesFrom lifted as an existential rather than a universal-implication; hasValue lifted as an existential rather than as a direct fact

expectedOutcome.summary: cardinality restrictions lift preserving count + property + (for QCR) onClass; counting axioms outside Horn route to Annotated Approximation at projection time

fixtures.intendedToCatch: cardinality silently dropped; QCR onClass filter erased; counting semantics lifted via a wrong existentialisation that loses the count

expectedOutcome.summary: class assertion → unary fact; object property assertion → binary fact; data property assertion → binary fact preserving typed literal

fixtures.intendedToCatch: data property assertion silently dropping the datatype IRI to a bare string; object property assertion folding source/target into the wrong order; class assertion treated as TBox rather than ABox

expectedOutcome.summary: owl:sameAs and owl:differentFrom lift to facts under reserved predicate names; sameAs equivalence axiomatization (reflexivity/symmetry/transitivity) injected

fixtures.intendedToCatch: owl:sameAs / owl:differentFrom dropped as 'metadata'; equivalence axiomatization not injected (which would silently disable identity propagation through other predicates)

expectedOutcome.summary: Functional/Transitive/Symmetric/InverseOf lift to canonical FOL axioms; recursive characteristics rewritten with visited-ancestor cycle guards per ADR-011; SLD resolution terminates

fixtures.intendedToCatch: lifter emits naive transitive/symmetric rules without visited-ancestor guards (loops indefinitely); InverseOf lifted as a single-direction subPropertyOf; Functional axiom expressed in non-Horn form rather than the implication

expectedOutcome.summary: domain and range axioms lift to conditional universals (∀x,y. P(x,y) → Domain(x); symmetric for range); structural FOL-tree match per API §3.7.1.1 worked example
expectedOutcome.phase4Reactivation: at Phase 4, additional expectation: prov:Entity(project_alpha) and prov:Entity(project_beta) entailed via the conditional implications once PROV-O ARC is loaded

fixtures.intendedToCatch: domain/range axioms silently dropped or lifted as existential restrictions on the domain/range class — companion canary catches the wrong-translation, this fixture catches the right-shape regression

expectedOutcome.summary: blank-node-bearing class expression lifts with deterministic Skolem identifiers via rdf-canonize (RDFC-1.0); 100 lift runs produce byte-identical Skolem IDs

fixtures.intendedToCatch: non-canonical blank-node naming producing different Skolem IDs each run; determinism failure surfaced as byte-diff across runs

expectedOutcome.summary: wrong existentialised translation forbidden; lifted FOL state has no synthesized ∀x. Domain(x) → ∃y. P(x,y) axiom and no SubClassOf(Domain, ObjectSomeValuesFrom(P, owl:Thing)) on the OWL side; query ∃y. P(lonely_entity, y) returns 'undetermined' (open-world) rather than 'true' via fabricated Skolem successor

fixtures.intendedToCatch: wrong existentialisation of domain/range axioms — would entail a fabricated Skolem successor for any class member, producing false existential entailments the source did not assert

expectedOutcome.summary: identity propagation through other predicates: same_as(a,b) ∧ p(b,c) ⊨ p(a,c) — query worksAt(superman, dailyplanet) returns 'true' (not 'undetermined')

fixtures.intendedToCatch: lifter that lifts owl:sameAs to facts but fails to inject identity-aware predicate variants per spec §5.5.2 — queries on substituted-individual names silently return 'undetermined' rather than the entailed 'true' verdict

expectedOutcome.summary: three IRI input forms (full URI, CURIE, bare URI) of the same axiom lift to byte-identical FOL after stableStringify; canonical internal form is expanded full URI

fixtures.intendedToCatch: lifter that fails to expand CURIEs against the prefix table or stores prefix-shorthand-form internally, leaking surface form into the canonical FOL state and producing different lifted output for semantically-identical inputs

expectedOutcome.summary: five punted-construct cases (owl:hasKey, NegativeObjectPropertyAssertion, punning, faceted-datatype-restriction, annotation-on-annotation) each throw UnsupportedConstructError with the documented `construct` field set to the specific construct identifier

fixtures.intendedToCatch: lifter that silently accepts a spec §13.1 punted construct and emits degraded FOL — or throws a generic Error rather than the typed UnsupportedConstructError with the documented `construct` field
